title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Market Management Committee 22-006, Dated February 17, 2022, ? Resolution Approving the Staggered Payment of Rent for Three Consecutive Months to Commence on March to May 2022 of Stallholders at the Fruit Section of the Batong Malake Public Market.? (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 03/07/2022)
